queries.question: Describe all case studies and also describe interviews focused on Environmental science.
queries.sql:
SELECT Case_Studies.description
FROM Case_Studies
UNION
SELECT Interviews.description
FROM Interviews
WHERE Interviews.Topic = "Environmental Science"

queries.question: Describe case studies and interviews focused on Environmental Science.
queries.sql:
SELECT Case_Studies.description
FROM Case_Studies
WHERE Case_Studies.Topic = "Environmental Science"
UNION
SELECT Interviews.description
FROM Interviews
WHERE Interviews.Topic = "Environmental Science"
